requirements.summary: Fix the frontend admin login flow so that after Internet Identity authentication completes, the adminLogin call is made correctly, errors are caught and displayed to the user, and on success the user is routed to the admin dashboard
acceptanceCriteria: After completing Internet Identity login with admin credentials, adminLogin is called and a success response routes the user to the admin dashboard.
If adminLogin returns an error, a clear error message is displayed to the user on the login page.
The login flow does not silently fail — any backend error is surfaced in the UI.

file_operations.description: Fix the admin login flow after Internet Identity authentication completes. Wrap the adminLogin call in proper error handling using try-catch, display error messages to the user when adminLogin fails, and ensure successful admin login redirects to the dashboard. Verify that the pendingAdminLogin state and credentials are correctly passed to the post-authentication handler.
